description: Ingeniux CTnP MCP server for personalization, A/B testing, and audience management.
name: io.github.jitsmaster/ctnp-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the CTnP REST API (e.g. https://yoursite.com/api)
environmentVariables.name: CTNP_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the CTnP CMS (e.g. https://yoursite.com)
environmentVariables.name: CTNP_CMS_URL

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for CTnP API authentication
environmentVariables.name: CTNP_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: CMS user ID (optional, for personalization context)
environmentVariables.name: CTNP_CMS_USER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated CMS group IDs for permission context (default: UserGroup/1)
environmentVariables.name: CTNP_CMS_GROUP_IDS

environmentVariables.description: CTnP connection ID for multi-tenant setups (optional)
environmentVariables.name: CTNP_CONNECTION_ID

title: CTnP MCP Server
